primary_accounting_issue: Eligibility of an intragroup dividend receivable for designation as a hedged item in a hedge accounting relationship under IFRS

primary_authority.reason: These paragraphs directly govern which items can be designated as hedged items in consolidated financial statements, including the exception for foreign‑currency‑risk of intragroup monetary items.

supporting_authority.reason: Provides guidance on the scope of eligible hedged items and clarifies that hedge accounting is generally limited to transactions with external parties, supporting the restriction in IFRS 9 paragraph 6.3.5.

peripheral_authority.reason: Deals with disclosures for financial instruments and hedge relationships, but does not determine eligibility of a hedged item.
Addresses disclosure of interests in other entities; not relevant to the hedge‑eligibility question.
Covers related‑party disclosures; not applicable to hedge designation criteria.

treatment_families.family: Hedge‑ineligible intragroup item (general rule for internal transactions)

approaches.label: Fair value hedge for intragroup monetary item
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 paragraph 6.3.6 permits designation of the foreign‑currency risk of an intragroup monetary item as a hedged item in consolidated statements when the FX differences are not eliminated on consolidation.

approaches.label: No hedge designation for intragroup items
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 paragraph 6.3.5 generally prohibits hedge designation for intragroup items in consolidated financial statements unless the specific exception for foreign‑currency risk applies.
